options.name: Set Automatically
options.description: Automatically set based on resource and operation

options.name: Set Manually
options.description: Manually set the description

properties.name: toolDescription
properties.description: Explain to the LLM what this tool does, a good, specific description would allow LLMs to produce expected results much more often

options.name: Text to Speech
options.description: Generate speech audio from text input

properties.name: modelId

options.name: Speech 02 HD
options.description: Superior rhythm and stability with outstanding quality

options.name: Speech 02 Turbo
options.description: Enhanced multilingual capabilities and performance

options.name: Speech 2.6 HD
options.description: HD model with outstanding prosody and cloning similarity

options.name: Speech 2.6 Turbo
options.description: Turbo model with support for 40 languages

options.name: Speech 2.8 HD
options.description: Latest HD model with ultra-realistic quality and sound tags

options.name: Speech 2.8 Turbo
options.description: Latest Turbo model with seamless speed and natural flow

properties.description: The speech synthesis model to use

properties.name: text
properties.description: The text to convert to speech (max 10,000 characters)
properties.placeholder: e.g. Hello, welcome to our service!

properties.name: voiceId
properties.description: Voice ID to use for speech synthesis. Browse available voices in the MiniMax documentation.

properties.name: downloadAudio
properties.description: Whether to download the generated audio as binary data. When disabled, only the audio URL is returned.

options.name: audioFormat
options.description: Output audio format. WAV is only supported in non-streaming mode.

options.name: emotion
options.description: Emotion for synthesized speech. By default the model auto-selects the most natural emotion.

options.name: languageBoost
options.description: Enhance recognition for a specific language

options.name: pitch
options.description: Speech pitch adjustment (-12 to 12, 0 = original pitch)

options.name: speed
options.description: Speech speed (0.5-2, higher = faster)

options.name: volume
options.description: Speech volume (0.1-10, higher = louder)

options.name: Generate an Image
options.description: Create an image from a text prompt

properties.name: modelId

options.name: Image-01
options.description: High-quality image generation with fine-grained details

properties.description: The model to use for image generation

properties.name: prompt
properties.description: Text description of the image to generate (max 1500 characters)
properties.placeholder: e.g. A serene mountain landscape at sunset with reflections in a lake

properties.name: aspectRatio
properties.description: Aspect ratio of the generated image

properties.name: numberOfImages
properties.description: Number of images to generate per request (1-9)

properties.name: downloadImage
properties.description: Whether to download the generated image as binary data. When disabled, only the image URL is returned.

options.name: promptOptimizer
options.description: Whether to automatically optimize the prompt for better results

options.name: seed
options.description: Random seed for reproducible outputs. Using the same seed and parameters produces the same image.

options.name: Message a Model
options.description: Send a message and get a response from a MiniMax model

properties.name: modelId
properties.description: The model to use for generating the response

values.name: content
values.description: The content of the message to be sent
values.placeholder: e.g. Hello, how can you help me?

values.name: role
values.description: Role in shaping the model's response, it tells the model how it should behave and interact with the user

options.name: User
options.description: Send a message as a user and get a response from the model

options.name: Assistant
options.description: Tell the model to adopt a specific tone or personality

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

options.name: hideThinking
options.description: Whether to strip chain-of-thought reasoning from the response, returning only the final answer

options.name: maxTokens
options.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion

options.name: maxToolsIterations
options.description: The maximum number of tool iteration cycles the LLM will run before stopping. A single iteration can contain multiple tool calls. Set to 0 for no limit.

options.name: temperature
options.description: Controls the randomness of the output. Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive.

options.name: topP
options.description: The maximum cumulative probability of tokens to consider when sampling

options.name: system
options.placeholder: e.g. You are a helpful assistant

options.name: Generate Video From Text
options.description: Generate a video from a text prompt

options.name: Generate Video From Image
options.description: Generate a video from an image, with optional last frame and subject reference

properties.name: modelId

options.name: MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3
options.description: Latest video generation model with enhanced realism

options.name: MiniMax-Hailuo-02
options.description: Video model supporting higher resolution and longer duration

options.name: T2V-01-Director
options.description: Text-to-video model with camera control commands

options.name: T2V-01
options.description: Standard text-to-video model

properties.description: The model to use for video generation

properties.name: prompt
properties.description: Text description of the video (max 2000 characters). Camera movements can be controlled using [command] syntax, e.g. [Push in], [Pan left].
properties.placeholder: e.g. A cat playing with a ball of yarn [Static shot]

properties.name: duration
properties.description: Duration of the generated video

properties.name: resolution
properties.description: Resolution of the generated video. Available options depend on the model.

properties.name: downloadVideo
properties.description: Whether to download the generated video as binary data. When disabled, only the video URL is returned.

options.name: promptOptimizer
options.description: Whether to automatically optimize the prompt for better results

properties.name: modelId

options.name: I2V-01
options.description: Standard image-to-video model

options.name: I2V-01-Director
options.description: Image-to-video with camera control commands

options.name: I2V-01-Live
options.description: Image-to-video live model

options.name: MiniMax-Hailuo-02
options.description: Model supporting higher resolution and longer duration

options.name: MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3
options.description: Latest model with enhanced realism

options.name: MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3-Fast
options.description: Faster image-to-video model for value and efficiency

properties.description: The model to use for video generation

properties.name: imageInputType
properties.description: How to provide the first frame image

properties.name: imageUrl
properties.description: Public URL of the image to use as first frame (JPG, JPEG, PNG, WebP, <20MB)

properties.name: binaryPropertyName
properties.hint: The name of the input field containing the binary image data

properties.name: prompt
properties.description: Optional text description of the video (max 2000 characters). Camera movements can be controlled using [command] syntax.
properties.placeholder: e.g. The subject smiles and waves at the camera [Zoom in]

properties.name: duration
properties.description: Duration of the generated video

properties.name: resolution
properties.description: Resolution of the generated video. Available options depend on the model.

properties.name: downloadVideo
properties.description: Whether to download the generated video as binary data. When disabled, only the video URL is returned.

options.name: promptOptimizer
options.description: Whether to automatically optimize the prompt

options.name: lastFrameInputType
options.description: Provide a last frame image to generate a first-and-last-frame video. Only supported by MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3 and MiniMax-Hailuo-02.

options.name: subjectReferenceInputType
options.description: Provide a face photo for facial consistency in the generated video. Only supported by MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3.
